pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 41-44 creates role with name 'Midwife'; verifier.py line 34-35 confirms this is the target role being checked

Web search confirmed 'Add Patients' is a standard OpenMRS privilege for patient record creation (https://guide.openmrs.org/administering-openmrs/user-management-and-access-control/); verifier.py line 35 and line 81 check for this privilege

pi_items.metadata_value: Midwifery staff responsible for maternity care
pi_items.verified_value: Midwifery staff responsible for maternity care
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 42 creates role with exact description matching metadata; verifier.py line 91 validates that description contains 'Midwifery staff'

privileged_info_summary: The grant_privilege_to_role task creates a synthetic Midwife role with the description 'Midwifery staff responsible for maternity care' via the OpenMRS REST API in setup_task.sh. The task requires adding the standard OpenMRS privilege 'Add Patients' to this role through the web UI. The verifier checks that the final role state contains this privilege by querying the OpenMRS API.
